pgxxxii-p1-s1: However, he did become "sold" on the ideas contained in this book.
pgxxxii-p1-s2: He has not had a drink for a great many years.
pgxxxii-p1-s3: I see him now and then and he is as fine a specimen of manhood as one could wish to meet.
pgxxxii-p1: However, he did become "sold" on the ideas contained in this book. He has not had a drink for a great many years. I see him now and then and he is as fine a specimen of manhood as one could wish to meet.
pgxxxii-p2-s1: I earnestly advise every alcoholic to read this book through, and though perhaps he came to scoff, he may remain to pray.
pgxxxii-p2: I earnestly advise every alcoholic to read this book through, and though perhaps he came to scoff, he may remain to pray.
